exercises.code:
import numpy as np
montos = np.array([10, 12, 14, 16, 100], dtype=float)
print(montos.size, round(float(np.mean(montos)), 2), float(np.median(montos)))

import numpy as np
montos = np.array([5, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 40], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(montos, [0.25, 0.75])
iqr = q3 - q1
print(round(float(q1), 2), round(float(q3), 2), round(float(iqr), 2))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([10, 11, 12, 13, 100], dtype=float)
mn, md = float(np.mean(x)), float(np.median(x))
print(mn, md, round(mn / md, 2))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([2, 3, 4, 5, 100], dtype=float)
mad = float(np.median(np.abs(x - np.median(x))))
print(mad)

import numpy as np
x = np.array([0, 1, 9, 99], dtype=float)
print([round(float(v), 3) for v in np.log1p(x)])

muestra = ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]
share = muestra.count("Lima") / len(muestra)
print(round(share, 2))

share = 8 / 10
bias_pp = share - 0.5
print(bias_pp)

import math
s = 2
n = 16
margen = 1.96 * s / math.sqrt(n)
print(round(margen, 3))

d = (13 - 10) / 2
print(round(d, 2))

diff = 4
se = 1.5
low = round(diff - 1.96 * se, 2)
high = round(diff + 1.96 * se, 2)
print((low, high))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4], dtype=float)
y = np.array([2, 4, 6, 8], dtype=float)
r = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
print(round(r, 3))

import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = z.copy()
y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1)
by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1])
ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
r_res = float(np.corrcoef(rx, ry)[0, 1]) if np.std(rx) > 0 and np.std(ry) > 0 else 0.0
print(round(r_raw, 3), round(r_res if np.isfinite(r_res) else 0.0, 3))

exercises.code:
import numpy as np
montos = np.array([10, 12, 11, 13, 50], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(montos, [0.25, 0.75])
hi = q3 + 1.5 * (q3 - q1)
print(int((montos > hi).sum()))

regiones = ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"]
flags = [True, True, False]
l_flags = [f for r, f in zip(regiones, flags) if r == "Lima"]
print(sum(l_flags) / len(l_flags))

import numpy as np
x = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 100], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(x, [0.25, 0.75])
iqr = q3 - q1
lo, hi = q1 - 1.5 * iqr, q3 + 1.5 * iqr
print(((x < lo) | (x > hi)).tolist())

exercises.code:
def traza(pregunta, metrica, valor, limite):
    print("P", pregunta)
    print("M", metrica)
    print("V", valor)
    print("L", limite)

traza("ticket", "median", 12, "web-only")

note = {"n_raw": 5, "n_final": 4, "filtros": ["monto>0"]}
print(note)

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha1(b"a,b\n1,2\n").hexdigest()[:8])

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, 0.0, 2.0]})
n_raw = len(df)
df2 = df[df["monto"] > 0]
note = {"n_raw": n_raw, "n_final": len(df2), "seed": 42}
print(note)
